text.source_text: यथा ब्रह्मणः प्रतिपादको वैशेषिको हेतुरुक्तः , नैवमर्थान्तरस्य वैशेषिको हेतुः प्रतिपादकोऽस्तीत्याह । नानुमानं साङ्ख्यस्मृतिपरिकल्पितं प्रधानम् इह द्युभ्वाद्यायतनत्वेन प्रतिपत्तव्यम् । कस्मात् ? अतच्छब्दात् । तस्याचेतनस्य प्रधानस्य प्रतिपादकः शब्दः तच्छब्दः , न तच्छब्दः अतच्छब्दः । न ह्यत्राचेतनस्य प्रधानस्य प्रतिपादकः कश्चिच्छब्दोऽस्ति , येनाचेतनं प्रधानं कारणत्वेनायतनत्वेन वावगम्येत । तद्विपरीतस्य चेतनस्य प्रतिपादकशब्दोऽत्रास्ति — ‘ यः सर्वज्ञः सर्ववित् ’ (मु. उ. १ । १ । ९) इत्यादिः । अत एव न वायुरपीह द्युभ्वाद्यायतनत्वेनाश्रीयते ॥ ३ ॥
text.transliteration_iast: yathā brahmaṇaḥ pratipādako vaiśeṣiko heturuktaḥ , naivamarthāntarasya vaiśeṣiko hetuḥ pratipādako'stītyāha | nānumānaṃ sāṅkhyasmṛtiparikalpitaṃ pradhānam iha dyubhvādyāyatanatvena pratipattavyam | kasmāt ? atacchabdāt | tasyācetanasya pradhānasya pratipādakaḥ śabdaḥ tacchabdaḥ , na tacchabdaḥ atacchabdaḥ | na hyatrācetanasya pradhānasya pratipādakaḥ kaścicchabdo'sti , yenācetanaṃ pradhānaṃ kāraṇatvenāyatanatvena vāvagamyeta | tadviparītasya cetanasya pratipādakaśabdo'trāsti — ‘ yaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarvavit ’ (mu. u. 1 | 1 | 9) ityādiḥ | ata eva na vāyurapīha dyubhvādyāyatanatvenāśrīyate || 3 ||

translation.literal_translation: Just as a specific reason establishing Brahman was given, no such specific establishing reason exists for an alternative. The inferentially posited Pradhana imagined from Sankhya Smriti should not be accepted here as the support of heaven and earth. Why? Because there is no word denoting it. A word denoting that insentient Pradhana would be a 'that-word'; here there is no such denotative term by which an insentient Pradhana could be grasped as cause or support. Rather, words denoting the opposite, namely a conscious principle, are present here, such as 'the one who is all-knowing and all-aware.' Therefore Vayu also is not to be taken here as support of heaven and earth.
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.3 basis: atacchabda excludes anumana-based Pradhana by absence of explicit textual denotation, while positive consciousness-markers (sarvajna, etc.) privilege Brahman. Same exclusion extends to Vayu candidate.
translation.interpretive_note: Denotation test: no proper scriptural sign for Pradhana in this locus.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated to match S04 style: doctrinal continuity plus explicit inferential tagging.
A later philological pass may tighten lexical precision for setu/ayatana/atacchabda terminology.
